basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Scientist D Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS Delhi) has published the Scientist D (Medical Educator) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Scientist D (Medical Educator) position on a contract basis. Candidates up to 55 years of age and holding a Master's Degree, Ph.D, BDS, BVSc, or B.E./B.Tech qualification in the relevant field with the required experience are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications via email on or before 27 June 2026. The notification PDF and application details are provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in relevant subject with 8 Year experience or Master's degree in relevant subject with Ph.D or M.Sc +Ph.D degree in relevant subject with 8Year experience OR BDS/BVSc degree with 9 Year experience OR B.E/B.Tech in CS/IT/E&C, Electronics or Equivalent with 5 Years experience.
qualification.details: Scientist D (Medical Educator): 1st class Master's degree in relevant subject with 8 Year experience 1st class Master's degree in relevant subject with Ph.D 2nd class M.Sc +Ph.D degree in relevant subject with 8Year experience BDS/BVSc degree with 9 Year experience B.E/B.Tech in CS/IT/E&C, Electronics or Equivalent with 5 Years experience Experience in multi-institutional coordination and quality monitoring of project deliverables.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Scientist D (Medical Educator) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Scientist D (Medical Educator) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist D (Medical Educator) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientist D (Medical Educator) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in a relevant subject with 8 years of experience, or a Master's degree with a Ph.D., or an M.Sc + Ph.D. degree with 8 years of experience. Alternatively, a BDS/BVSc degree with 9 years of experience or a B.E/B.Tech in CS/IT/E&C or equivalent with 5 years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 55 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Scientist D (Medical Educator) position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position for a research project.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Scientist D (Medical Educator) post?
faq.answer: The salary for this position will be as per the project guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Scientist D (Medical Educator) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Scientist D (Medical Educator) position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for AIIMS Delhi, located in New Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
